bead.title: Document pre-claim intake contract, failure-class mapping, and silent-idle diagnosis
bead.description:
PROBLEM
When the worker silently idles on a full queue (parent ddx-f9ddaa68), the operator has no documentation explaining the pre-claim intake contract, how intake outcomes map to worker behavior (warn-only vs operator-attention vs hard error), or how to diagnose a silent-idle stall. The warn payload's suggested_action ("check the readiness route or harness configuration and retry") misdirected the operator because the real fault was an internal decoder mismatch, not route/harness config.

ROOT CAUSE
No operator-facing documentation of (a) the pre-claim intake/readiness contract — the readiness_checks schema and verdict coercion at cli/internal/agent/preclaim_intake_hook.go:60-121; (b) the failure-class mapping in ClassifyReadinessWithMode (cli/internal/agent/readiness_classification.go:56-115): system_unready/intake_error fail-open skip, needs_refine warn-only proceed, operator_required park; and (c) the silent-idle escalation signals — the same-blocker idle escalation (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:3314, ddx-df77e668) and the claim-success-rate warning (sibling child). README.md and library/skills/ddx/reference/work.md do not cover these.

PROPOSED FIX
Add an operator-facing "Pre-claim intake & silent-idle diagnosis" section to README.md (and/or library/skills/ddx/reference/work.md) documenting: the readiness_checks contract and the canonical verdict forms (bool true to pass, false to fail, string passthrough, absent to empty); the warn vs operator-attention vs hard-error failure-class mapping (citing ClassifyReadinessWithMode); and a "worker idles on a full queue" diagnosis runbook pointing at loop.idle events, preClaimIdleEscalationThreshold, and the --claim-rate-window/--claim-rate-threshold warning. Cross-reference the readiness schema gate (sibling child) and ddx-df77e668.

NON-SCOPE
No code or behavior changes — documentation only. Do NOT add the schema gate or the claim-rate signal themselves (sibling children). Governing artifacts: FEAT-010 / ADR-023.

DEPENDENCIES
Depends on the readiness-schema child (for final schema/target names) and the claim-success-rate child (for the shipped flag names --claim-rate-window/--claim-rate-threshold) so the docs reference real names. Record both child IDs as deps when filed.

AC
1. README.md (and/or library/skills/ddx/reference/work.md) gains a section documenting the pre-claim intake readiness contract, the canonical verdict forms, and the warn/operator-attention/hard-error failure-class mapping citing ClassifyReadinessWithMode (cli/internal/agent/readiness_classification.go:56-115).
2. The section includes a "worker idles on a full queue" diagnosis runbook referencing loop.idle events, preClaimIdleEscalationThreshold (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:3314), and the --claim-rate-window/--claim-rate-threshold warning.
3. TestReadmeDocumentsPreClaimIntakeContract verifies the README contains the required headings/terms so the doc cannot silently regress.
4. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes
bead.acceptance:
1. README.md (and/or library/skills/ddx/reference/work.md) gains a section documenting the pre-claim intake readiness contract, the canonical verdict forms, and the warn/operator-attention/hard-error failure-class mapping citing ClassifyReadinessWithMode (cli/internal/agent/readiness_classification.go:56-115).
2. The section includes a "worker idles on a full queue" diagnosis runbook referencing loop.idle events, preClaimIdleEscalationThreshold (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:3314), and the --claim-rate-window/--claim-rate-threshold warning.
3. TestReadmeDocumentsPreClaimIntakeContract verifies the README contains the required headings/terms so the doc cannot silently regress.
4. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes
